arts.ttl: Furious Mikel Arteta slams his Arsenal players for their 'unacceptable' 1-1 draw with Chelsea... and reveals his 'biggest fear' in the title race after slipping NINE points adrift of Liverpool
arts.sum: The Gunners took the lead thanks to a thumping near-post finish from Gabriel Martinelli but let it slip after a mesmerising long-range effort from Chelsea summer signing Pedro Neto.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta issues worrying Arsenal injury update on Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice
arts.sum: Both Bukayo Saka and Declan Rice were forced off during Arsenal's draw at Chelsea on Sunday, with the duo having been called up to England's squad for next week's Nations League games

arts.ttl: ‘Show your teeth’: Arteta calls on Arsenal players to dig in after Chelsea draw
arts.sum: Visitors nine points behind Liverpool after 1-1 draw Coach calls on team to ‘show how much you want it’ A disappointed Mikel Arteta told his players to “show their teeth” and said he was praying they remain injury-free during the international break after a 1-1 draw with Chelsea that meant Arsenal lost further ground in the title race. Arsenal, who have fallen nine points behind Liverpool at the top of the table, missed an opportunity to get their campaign back on track during a tense encounter at Stamford Bridge. Arteta’s side, in fourth place after squandering eight points from winning positions this season, could not hold on after going ahead through Gabriel Martinelli, Pedro Neto levelling for Chelsea and lifting them to third. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Arteta 'praying' Arsenal’s injury 'nightmare' will end soon
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta says he is "praying" for Arsenal's injury "nightmare" to end as his side were left nine points adrift of Premier League leaders Liverpool after Sunday's 1-1 draw at Chelsea.
How we rated the players. The post Chelsea v Arsenal player ratings appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: Pedro Neto has caused Chelsea a MAJOR problem
arts.sum: Pedro Neto scored his first Premier League goal for Chelsea during their 1-1 draw against Arsenal on Sunday afternoon, but the Portuguese international appears to have handed Enzo Maresca a major problem in the process. Noni Madueke has arguably outperformed both Jadon Sancho and Mykhailo Mudryk so far this term, yet the England international has almost solely played on the right flank during his senior career.

arts.ttl: Liverpool’s Ibrahima Konaté opens up on France teammate and Arsenal counterpart William Saliba: “He’s a friend and like a brother to me.”
arts.sum: France international centre-back Ibrahima Konaté (25) gave a wide-ranging interview to Canal+ on Sunday. The in-form Liverpool centre-back will report this Monday at France’s Clairefontaine camp for Les Bleus‘ two…

arts.ttl: Chelsea will beat top sides ‘very soon’ – Maresca
arts.sum: Chelsea reaction. The post Chelsea will beat top sides ‘very soon’ – Maresca appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: ‘Rotten’… Chelsea fans fume at what £29m star did after being substituted vs Arsenal

Mikel Arteta admits he will resort to 'praying' in the Premier League title race as Arsenal fall nine points behind leaders Liverpool... and calls on his players to 'show their teeth' in a bizarre DISNEYLAND analogy
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: Mikel Arteta admits he will resort to 'praying' in Arsenal's mission to overturn Liverpool's nine-point lead at the Premier League summit.
